creator: cpiazza@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Committed, thanks! 
I removed the dependancy on nasm and changed the Makefiles so they do 
not use assembler.  I can not see any benefit in using ASM in such a  
simple program as this (other than as ASM programming practice :)).  Please 
look over my changes and see if they are okay.
